page: OVHcloud l40s-90 is a GPU-accelerated server belonging to the Cloud GPU family. It features an AMD EPYC 9124 processor built on the x86_64 architecture, providing 15 dedicated physical cores with a base clock speed of 2.75 GHz and no hyperthreading. The system is equipped with 90.0 GB of system memory, yielding 6.0 GB of RAM per core. Graphics and parallel processing acceleration are handled by a single NVIDIA L40S GPU based on the Ada Lovelace architecture, which provides 48 GB of dedicated VRAM. Local storage consists of a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and the network interface delivers a baseline bandwidth of 8 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate that the server delivers strong single-core CPU performance, placing in the top 25% in stress-ng tests. Multi-core CPU performance, memory bandwidth, and general database operations fall within the average tier. However, the server excels in machine learning workloads. LLM inference benchmarks for prompt processing and text generation across small, medium, and large models consistently rank in the top 10% tier. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression also shows strong performance in the top 25% tier.

From a resource density perspective, the server offers a specialized hardware profile that balances dedicated AMD EPYC CPU cores with a high-capacity 48 GB VRAM GPU. This configuration provides qualitative cost efficiency for workloads that require substantial GPU memory without needing massive multi-socket CPU configurations. The server is highly suited for large language model inference, generative AI workloads, ray tracing, and parallel data processing tasks.
description: OVHcloud l40s-90 is a dedicated GPU-accelerated server featuring 15 AMD EPYC 9124 cores running at 2.75 GHz, 90.0 GB of system memory, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD. Acceleration is driven by a single NVIDIA L40S GPU with 48 GB of VRAM on the Ada Lovelace architecture. Benchmarks show average multi-core CPU and memory performance, but the server achieves top-tier results in the top 10% for large language model inference tasks across various model sizes. It also demonstrates strong single-core CPU capabilities. This hardware profile is optimized for AI inference, parallel processing, and graphics-intensive workloads, offering a balanced ratio of dedicated compute resources to high-capacity GPU memory.
og_description: OVHcloud l40s-90 is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 15 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 90 GB RAM, a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and an NVIDIA L40S GPU with 48 GB VRAM, optimized for top-tier LLM inference.
meta_description: OVHcloud l40s-90 is a GPU-accelerated server with 15 AMD EPYC cores, 90 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA L40S GPU with 48 GB VRAM for AI inference workloads.
tagline: A dedicated GPU-accelerated platform featuring Ada Lovelace architecture and high-capacity VRAM for top-tier artificial intelligence inference workloads.
bullet_points: NVIDIA L40S GPU with 48 GB VRAM for parallel processing
15 dedicated AMD EPYC 9124 CPU cores at 2.75 GHz
90.0 GB of system memory and 400 GB local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier performance in large language model inference benchmarks
8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM hypervisor virtualization
